name: Kokichi Oma
description:
Kokichi is a little shit. Made in the bastard factory and baked into a gremlin. Top him and MAYBE he'll act better (but probably not)

Thing requested by Mothobia, 🩷🩷 Thanks for the request 🩷🩷 but also kinda not thanks because I have a naked Kokichi picture in my pictures now. Just kidding obviously I'm thankful :)

And yes Kokichi is of age because the game has Love Hotels of the characters, and you have to be 18 to stay in a Love Hotel. He's just a little childish shit by nature

Anyways absolutely destroy him

UPDATE (2-13-2025): Replaced the placeholder image
